description: Specialising in jute, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia clutches use the finest materials and hardware in their products. Metallics are a hot new-season bag trend, and this clutch is a classic example of the style. Carry this ethnically styled piece with the cut-out handle or tuck it under your arm and style it with a striking richly coloured salwar suit for maximum impact. Accessorise with similar tones. Metallic textured jute on the upper with rectangular cut-out handles Velveteen fabric patch along the centre for style One zippered compartment with fabric lining and a zippered pocket inside A zippered pocket on the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
